scripts.test: npm run setup-deps && node run-deno-test.js integration.test.ts
scripts.test:edge-functions: npm run setup-deps && node run-deno-test.js edge-functions-integration.test.ts
scripts.test:cors-validation: npm run setup-deps && node run-deno-test.js cors-validation.test.ts
scripts.test:cors-http-methods: npm run setup-deps && node run-deno-test.js cors-http-methods.test.ts
scripts.test:cors-errors: npm run setup-deps && node run-deno-test.js cors-errors.test.ts
scripts.test:cors-all: npm run test:cors-validation && npm run test:cors-http-methods && npm run test:cors-errors
